revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
style="width: {{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+16}}|{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+2}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}}}px; {{#switch:{{{float|}}}|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;}} {{#if:{{{margin|}}}|margin: {{{margin}}};}} {{#if:{{{padding|}}}|padding: {{{padding}}};}} {{#if:{{{border|}}}|border: {{{border}}};}} {{#if:{{{font-size|}}}|font-size: {{{font-size}}};}} line-height: 1; text-align: {{{text-align|center}}}; background-color: {{{svg-background-color|{{{background-color|#ffffff}}}}}}; position: relative; {{#if:{{{overflow-x|}}}|max-width: 100%; overflow-x: {{{overflow-x|auto}}};}}">{{#if:{{{fullimage|}}} |{{{fullimage}}} |[[File:{{{image|Bad Title Example.png}}}{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{!}}border}}{{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{!}}thumb{{!}}none}}|{{Str number/trim|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}px{{#ifeq:{{{link|File:}}}|File:||{{!}}link={{{link|}}}}}|alt={{{alt|}}}|{{{caption|}}}]] }}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
style="width: {{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+16}}|{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+2}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}}}px; {{#switch:{{{float|}}}|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;}} {{#if:{{{margin|}}}|margin: {{{margin}}};}} {{#if:{{{padding|}}}|padding: {{{padding}}};}} {{#if:{{{border|}}}|border: {{{border}}};}} {{#if:{{{font-size|}}}|font-size: {{{font-size}}};}} line-height: 1; text-align: {{{text-align|center}}}; background-color: {{{svg-background-color|{{{background-color|#ffffff}}}}}}; position: relative; {{#if:{{{overflow-x|}}}|max-width: 100%; overflow-x: {{{overflow-x|auto}}};}}">{{#if:{{{fullimage|}}} |{{{fullimage}}} |[[File:{{{image|Bad Title Example.png}}}{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{!}}border}}{{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{!}}thumb{{!}}none}}|{{Str number/trim|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}px{{#ifeq:{{{link|File:}}}|File:||{{!}}link={{{link|}}}}}|alt={{{alt|}}}|{{{caption|}}}]] }}
{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
style="width: {{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+16}}|{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+2}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}}}px; {{#switch:{{{float|}}}|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;}} {{#if:{{{margin|}}}|margin: {{{margin}}};}} {{#if:{{{padding|}}}|padding: {{{padding}}};}} {{#if:{{{border|}}}|border: {{{border}}};}} {{#if:{{{font-size|}}}|font-size: {{{font-size}}};}} line-height: 1; text-align: {{{text-align|center}}}; background-color: {{{svg-background-color|{{{background-color|#ffffff}}}}}}; position: relative; {{#if:{{{overflow-x|}}}|max-width: 100%; overflow-x: {{{overflow-x|auto}}};}}">{{#if:{{{fullimage|}}} |{{{fullimage}}} |[[File:{{{image|Bad Title Example.png}}}{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{!}}border}}{{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{!}}thumb{{!}}none}}|{{Str number/trim|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}px{{#ifeq:{{{link|File:}}}|File:||{{!}}link={{{link|}}}}}|alt={{{alt|}}}|{{{caption|}}}]] }}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
style="width: {{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+16}}|{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+2}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}}}px; {{#switch:{{{float|}}}|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;}} {{#if:{{{margin|}}}|margin: {{{margin}}};}} {{#if:{{{padding|}}}|padding: {{{padding}}};}} {{#if:{{{border|}}}|border: {{{border}}};}} {{#if:{{{font-size|}}}|font-size: {{{font-size}}};}} line-height: 1; text-align: {{{text-align|center}}}; background-color: {{{svg-background-color|{{{background-color|#ffffff}}}}}}; position: relative; {{#if:{{{overflow-x|}}}|max-width: 100%; overflow-x: {{{overflow-x|auto}}};}}">{{#if:{{{fullimage|}}} |{{{fullimage}}} |[[File:{{{image|Bad Title Example.png}}}{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{!}}border}}{{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{!}}thumb{{!}}none}}|{{Str number/trim|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}px{{#ifeq:{{{link|File:}}}|File:||{{!}}link={{{link|}}}}}|alt={{{alt|}}}|{{{caption|}}}]] }}
{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
style="width: {{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+16}}|{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+2}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}}}px; {{#switch:{{{float|}}}|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;}} {{#if:{{{margin|}}}|margin: {{{margin}}};}} {{#if:{{{padding|}}}|padding: {{{padding}}};}} {{#if:{{{border|}}}|border: {{{border}}};}} {{#if:{{{font-size|}}}|font-size: {{{font-size}}};}} line-height: 1; text-align: {{{text-align|center}}}; background-color: {{{svg-background-color|{{{background-color|#ffffff}}}}}}; position: relative; {{#if:{{{overflow-x|}}}|max-width: 100%; overflow-x: {{{overflow-x|auto}}};}}">{{#if:{{{fullimage|}}} |{{{fullimage}}} |[[File:{{{image|Bad Title Example.png}}}{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{!}}border}}{{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{!}}thumb{{!}}none}}|{{Str number/trim|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}px{{#ifeq:{{{link|File:}}}|File:||{{!}}link={{{link|}}}}}|alt={{{alt|}}}|{{{caption|}}}]] }}
{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

style="width: {{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+16}}|{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{#expr:{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}+2}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}}}px; {{#switch:{{{float|}}}|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;}} {{#if:{{{margin|}}}|margin: {{{margin}}};}} {{#if:{{{padding|}}}|padding: {{{padding}}};}} {{#if:{{{border|}}}|border: {{{border}}};}} {{#if:{{{font-size|}}}|font-size: {{{font-size}}};}} line-height: 1; text-align: {{{text-align|center}}}; background-color: {{{svg-background-color|{{{background-color|#ffffff}}}}}}; position: relative; {{#if:{{{overflow-x|}}}|max-width: 100%; overflow-x: {{{overflow-x|auto}}};}}">{{#if:{{{fullimage|}}} |{{{fullimage}}} |[[File:{{{image|Bad Title Example.png}}}{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{!}}border}}{{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{!}}thumb{{!}}none}}|{{Str number/trim|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}px{{#ifeq:{{{link|File:}}}|File:||{{!}}link={{{link|}}}}}|alt={{{alt|}}}|{{{caption|}}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{fullimage|}}} |{{{fullimage}}} |[[File:{{{image|Bad Title Example.png}}}{{#if:{{{border2|}}}|{{!}}border}}{{#if:{{{thumb|}}}|{{!}}thumb{{!}}none}}|{{Str number/trim|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{{width}}}|400}}}}px{{#ifeq:{{{link|File:}}}|File:||{{!}}link={{{link|}}}}}|alt={{{alt|}}}|{{{caption|}}}]] }}
